settings.heading: YOUR MIX DESERVES BETTER THAN AN OFFICE CHAIR

settings.text: Engineered for the people who engineer the sound. Custom-fit ergonomic seating built to your body type, height & weight — with patented ZenWave technology trusted on world tours and in studios everywhere.

settings.heading: TRUSTED BY THE BEST IN AUDIO AND LIGHTING

settings.text:
The Stealth Chair provides improved support to reduce the stress on your body as you work. A traditional chair creates unhealthy pressure points from the hip bones, the tailbone and the legs which increase as you lean forward to work.

This truly is the chair that outclasses other music chairs.

settings.heading: CUSTOM-FIT TO YOUR BODY. BUILT FOR YOUR SESSION.

settings.text:
Every Stealth Chair is built to your body style and height — creating the best ergonomic seating experience in the industry.

From studio sessions to FOH positions, our patented design lets music and lighting engineers work comfortably for hours. Do what you love, longer, without the pain.

settings.description: BEST STUDIO CHAIR | Stealth Executive Audio Engineer Chair (ERGOLAB)

settings.title: LOOKING FOR A STEALTH CHAIR OUTSIDE THE USA?
settings.text: Stealth Works With Universal Distribution to bring you stealth chairs wherever you are.

settings.title: VIEW THE STEALTH GALLERY OF FAME
settings.text: Stealth Chairs Are Used by Customers everywhere providing the best experience in seating for all types of users. Our Users are why Stealth Chairs By ErgoLab Exists.

settings.heading: PEOPLE ARE DIFFERENT
settings.row_content:
Not a profound observation we admit, but one that most chair manufacturers continually overlook. At ErgoLab we've embraced this idea by designing each of our ergonomically correct chairs to not only fit your body, but to specifically perform in a manner that is suitable for your demanding work environment.

Sit in a ErgoLab chair for any length of time and you'll quickly realize that it is like no other chair you have sat in before. That's because we design each of our ergonomically correct chairs to support a specific combination of physical attributes and professional responsibilities.

settings.heading: WHO WE ARE
settings.row_content:
ErgoLab has been an industry leader in the design and manufacturing of ergonomically correct chairs. Utilizing the highest quality materials and craftsmanship, ErgoLab manufactures a wide variety of styles for professionals across multiple industries.

Our exclusive, ergonomically correct designs provide unparalleled support to professionals like yourself. Support that promotes proper posture during both resting and working activities, helps minimize fatigue, reduces chronic back, neck, and arm pain and increases circulation to the legs. All of which help you perform at your best.

settings.heading: DESIGN TECHNOLOGY
settings.row_content:
Using patented technology, the designers of these revolutionary chairs were able to design a conventional looking task chair which allows the user to adjust the seat pan with enough downward slope to keep the lordosis curve in the lower back. Combining a seat shell which pivots as the user leans forward, with a convex shaped, specially tensioned mesh surface, the Stealth allows the user to eliminate the harmful loading of the intervertebral discs in both the active working position and the reclining passive or resting position.

This new technology also equalizes pressure from the seat surface, thereby eliminating uncomfortable, unhealthy pressure points under the thighs, the tailbone and the hips as the user leans forward to access their work area.

settings.heading: EXCLUSIVE PATENTS
settings.row_content: Unlike any other chair in the world, these models can be used in a traditional upright seated position or in a forward tilted declining position.   So, for the first time in human existence, there is a better, healthier way to sit.

settings.heading: ENGINEERED FOR THE PEOPLE WHO ENGINEER THE SOUND
settings.text: From the studio to the stage — patented ZenWave technology and custom-fit ergonomic design trusted by the world's top engineers.

settings.title: Performers
settings.text: Play longer, sit better — a performance seat that supports your craft.

settings.quote: The Stealth Chair completely changed my studio sessions. I used to deal with constant back pain after long mixes — now I can work 12+ hours and feel great. It's the most important piece of gear in my room.
